headline: Y Combinator founders cluster around OpenAI and Anthropic leadership
body: A significant concentration of Y Combinator alumni are now leading roles at OpenAI and Anthropic, signaling where venture-backed talent sees the highest-impact AI opportunities. This talent consolidation matters for healthcare AI because these two organizations are setting the technical and commercial standards that EHR vendors, health systems, and consulting firms will adopt. The clustering also reflects market expectations about which AI platforms will dominate clinical decision support and administrative automation over the next 24 months. Healthcare organizations evaluating foundation model partnerships should monitor where engineering talent concentrates as a leading indicator of platform stability and feature velocity.
